mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slip_detail ( slip_id, code, name, price, tax_price, credit, planned_label, media_name, release_date, note ) VALUES ( #{slipId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{price}, #{taxPrice}, #{credit}, #{plannedLabel}, #{mediaName}, #{releaseDate}, #{note} )
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.slip_id AS slipId, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price AS taxPrice, d.credit, d.planned_label AS plannedLabel, d.media_name AS mediaName, d.release_date AS releaseDate, d.note, d.returned, d.returned_date AS returnedDate FROM slip_detail d JOIN slip s ON d.slip_id = s.id WHERE s.slip_no = #{slipNo} ORDER BY d.id

SELECT s.id AS slipId, s.slip_no AS slipNo, s.staff_name AS staffName, s.customer_name AS customerName, s.loan_date AS loanDate, s.return_date AS returnDate, d.id, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price AS taxPrice, d.credit, d.planned_label AS plannedLabel, d.media_name AS mediaName, d.release_date AS releaseDate, d.note, d.returned FROM slip s JOIN slip_detail d ON s.id = d.slip_id WHERE s.slip_no LIKE CONCAT(#{slipNo}, '%') ORDER BY d.id

SELECT s.id AS slipId, s.slip_no AS slipNo, s.staff_name AS staffName, s.customer_name AS customerName, s.loan_date AS loanDate, s.return_date AS returnDate, d.id, d.code, d.name, d.price, d.tax_price AS taxPrice, d.credit, d.planned_label AS plannedLabel, d.media_name AS mediaName, d.release_date AS releaseDate, d.note, d.returned FROM slip s JOIN slip_detail d ON s.id = d.slip_id WHERE d.code LIKE CONCAT(#{code}, '%') ORDER BY s.slip_no, d.id
mapper.update: UPDATE slip_detail SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, tax_price = #{taxPrice}, credit = #{credit}, planned_label = #{plannedLabel}, media_name = #{mediaName}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
